## Fit with the project's direction

Design Factory is a local-first AI design workspace. It avoids cloud
sync, account systems, and connector ecosystems. Features should keep
the output on the user's disk, keep provider choice open, and prefer
direct manipulation over extra prompting.

How does this proposal align? Which trade-off, if any, does it require?
